description: Controlled multi-tenant alpha P0 boundary for the managed-agents execution runtime.
limitations: This gate verifies the controlled multi-tenant kernel boundary against local provider contracts; it is not a live BytePlus conformance run.
AgentKit Knowledge remains unavailable to shared deployments until the deployment and each binding carry live verification evidence.
Exactly-once mutation recovery requires a provider that honors the supplied idempotency key or exposes authoritative reconciliation.
Passing this gate does not establish public-beta or production readiness; the P1 register and explicit release approval remain open.

criticalAssertions.fullName: delegated run tenancy and policy derives child ownership from the locked non-default parent
delegated run tenancy and policy rejects a delegated agent version owned by another tenant
atomic run admission admits at most one direct run under a parallel burst and leaks no child rows
atomic run admission rolls back rejected delegation and admits a replacement in the released child slot
tenant-owned AgentKit Knowledge bindings resolves the same logical name to each tenant authoritative provider mapping
tenant-owned AgentKit Knowledge bindings cannot address another tenant collection or an unverified binding
MCP toolsets fails closed when execution policy cannot classify a discovered tool
MCP toolsets reconciles a crash after remote MCP commit without replaying the mutation
MCP toolsets recovers crashes before dispatch and after receipt commit for idempotent MCP
MCP toolsets serializes concurrent recovery so terminal not_found dispatches only once
MCP toolsets bounds read-only MCP latency and response size
MCP toolsets passes stable idempotency and scoped credentials only to the MCP transport
external.http.request executes an approval-free write exactly once and dedupes retries
external.http.request retries a PENDING receipt with the same idempotency key (at-least-once + dedupe)
egress address policy rejects every answer when DNS rebinding returns public then private
egress address policy does not let an exact-granted hostname pivot into metadata address space
bounded redirects and transport revalidates each redirect and denies metadata destinations
bounded redirects and transport aborts streaming bodies beyond the response byte limit
production configuration refuses to start without an explicit non-default API token
production configuration binds the API to loopback unless an address is explicitly configured
production configuration refuses to enable harness fault injection in production
production configuration keeps AgentKit Knowledge disabled in shared deployments until live verification
production configuration requires an allowlist or controlled egress proxy for shared deployments
API error boundary redacts internal server failures and returns the request correlation id
credential broker does not release across tenants, callers, purposes, resources, or actions
credential broker atomically enforces a one-use grant under concurrent resolution
credential broker denies child and fork inheritance by default and permits each only explicitly
credential broker records secret-free receipts and deduplicates a logical retry
governed action pipeline serializes a pool-sized same-action recovery burst without starving the pool
governed action pipeline marks uncertain mutation failures for reconciliation and will not redispatch them
